en.category_description: Request support for errors, access issues, or performance problems related to the portal or system.

es.category_description: Solicite asistencia para errores, problemas de acceso o rendimiento relacionados con el portal o el sistema.

fr.category_description: Demandez une assistance pour les erreurs, les problèmes d’accès ou de performance liés au portail ou au système.

ko.category_description: 포털 또는 시스템 전반에서 발생하는 오류, 접근 문제, 성능 저하 등에 대한 해결을 요청합니다.

en.category_description: Request support for issues occurring during login or authentication.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the affected account information.

es.category_description: Solicite asistencia para problemas durante el inicio de sesión o la autenticación.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya la información de la cuenta afectada.

fr.category_description: Demandez une assistance pour les problèmes liés à la connexion ou à l’authentification.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les informations du compte concerné.

ko.category_description: 로그인과 인증 과정에 발생한 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 문제가 발생한 계정 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request support for system changes related to permissions or roles.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the relevant permission or role details.

es.category_description: Solicite asistencia para cambios del sistema relacionados con permisos o roles.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya los detalles del permiso o rol correspondiente.

fr.category_description: Demandez une assistance pour les modifications système liées aux permissions ou aux rôles.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les détails des permissions ou rôles concernés.

ko.category_description: 권한 혹은 직책에 대해 시스템 수정이 필요한 경우 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 권한 혹은 직책 정보와 수정 사항을 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request support for errors occurring in the UI or specific pages.
en.category_placeholder: Please specify the page and error details.

es.category_description: Solicite asistencia para errores en la interfaz o en páginas específicas.
es.category_placeholder: Indique la página y los detalles del error.

fr.category_description: Demandez une assistance pour les erreurs sur l’interface ou certaines pages.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez préciser la page et les détails de l’erreur.

ko.category_description: UI 혹은 페이지에서 발생한 오류에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 문제가 발생한 UI 혹은 페이지와 오류 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request support for degraded performance or system availability issues.
en.category_placeholder: Please include details about the performance or availability issue.

es.category_description: Solicite asistencia por problemas de rendimiento o disponibilidad del sistema.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya detalles sobre el problema de rendimiento o disponibilidad.

fr.category_description: Demandez une assistance pour les problèmes de performance ou de disponibilité du système.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les détails du problème de performance ou de disponibilité.

ko.category_description: 성능 혹은 사용성이 저하된 문제의 해결이나 개선을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 성능 혹은 사용성이 저하된 문제나 개선이 필요한 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request changes to workflows or system-related processes.
en.category_placeholder: Please include details of the workflow or process to be changed.

es.category_description: Solicite cambios en los flujos de trabajo o procesos del sistema.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya los detalles del flujo de trabajo o proceso a modificar.

fr.category_description: Demandez des modifications des flux de travail ou des processus système.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les détails du flux de travail ou du processus à modifier.

ko.category_description: 포털 혹은 시스템에 귀속된 작업에 대해 변경을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 수정이 필요한 포털 혹은 시스템 작업 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.
